name: cloud-news-dashboard
description: Static cloud news dashboard powered by RSS feeds.

scripts.validate-news: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('news.json','utf8')); if (!data.lastUpdated || !Array.isArray(data.items)) process.exit(1); console.log('news.json valid:', data.items.length, 'items');"
